tasks.title: Set up API proxy endpoints structure
tasks.description: Create the necessary proxy endpoint structure following the required patterns for REST API calls.
tasks.details:
- Create proxy routes under `src/pages/api/proxy`
- Implement proxy pattern according to `cursor_rules/nextjs_api_routes.mdc`
- Set up `/api/proxy/payments/initialize` endpoint
- Set up `/api/proxy/payments/{transactionId}` endpoint for polling
- Set up `/api/proxy/memberships/subscriptions` endpoint
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that all proxy endpoints correctly forward requests to the backend and handle responses appropriately.

tasks.title: Create TypeScript interfaces from Swagger API docs
tasks.description: Generate TypeScript interfaces for payment-related data structures based on the Swagger API documentation.
tasks.details:
- Extract and define interfaces for `PaymentSession`, `PaymentStatusResponse`, and other relevant types from `documentation/Swagger_API_Docs/api-docs.json`
- Create shared type definitions for payment provider configurations
- Define enums for payment provider types (STRIPE, PAYPAL, REVOLUT, ZEFFY, ZELLE)
tasks.testStrategy: Ensure TypeScript compiler validates the interfaces against sample data from the API documentation.

tasks.title: Implement UniversalPaymentCheckout component
tasks.description: Create a client component that renders different payment UIs based on the provider type determined by the backend.
tasks.details:
- Create a new React component `UniversalPaymentCheckout`
- Add logic to determine which provider-specific UI to render based on backend response
- Implement loading states and error handling
- Ensure the component can be easily integrated into the checkout flow
tasks.testStrategy: Test with mock responses for different provider types to ensure correct UI rendering and behavior.

tasks.title: Refactor Stripe Elements integration
tasks.description: Update the existing Stripe integration to use backend-provided publishable keys instead of hardcoded ones.
tasks.details:
- Remove embedded Stripe publishable keys from frontend code
- Update Stripe Elements initialization to use keys provided by backend
- Ensure wallet buttons (Apple Pay, Google Pay) continue to function
- Integrate with the UniversalPaymentCheckout component
tasks.testStrategy: Test the complete Stripe checkout flow with backend-provided keys to ensure payments process correctly.

tasks.title: Implement PayPal checkout integration
tasks.description: Add support for PayPal as a payment method with embedded buttons and redirect fallback.
tasks.details:
- Add PayPal SDK integration
- Implement PayPal Buttons component
- Handle success, cancel, and error flows
- Add redirect fallback mechanism
- Integrate with UniversalPaymentCheckout component
tasks.testStrategy: Test PayPal checkout flow in both button and redirect modes, verifying successful payments and proper error handling.

tasks.title: Implement Revolut checkout integration
tasks.description: Add support for Revolut as a payment method with redirect to hosted page for SCA and polling for completion.
tasks.details:
- Create "Pay with Revolut" button component
- Implement redirect to Revolut hosted page
- Add polling mechanism to check transaction status
- Handle PSD2/SCA requirements
- Integrate with UniversalPaymentCheckout component
tasks.testStrategy: Test the complete Revolut flow including redirect, SCA handling, and successful return to the application.

tasks.title: Implement Zeffy donation integration
tasks.description: Add support for Zeffy donations for events flagged as zero-fee fundraisers.
tasks.details:
- Create Zeffy embed component
- Implement detection of `DONATION_ZERO_FEE` flag
- Add fallback mechanism if Zeffy fails
- Integrate with UniversalPaymentCheckout component
tasks.testStrategy: Test Zeffy integration with both successful donation flows and fallback scenarios.

tasks.title: Implement Zelle manual payment flow
tasks.description: Add support for Zelle manual payments with instructions and pending status messaging.
tasks.details:
- Create Zelle instructions component
- Implement confirmation dialog
- Add backend call to create pending transaction
- Display "Awaiting confirmation" status
- Integrate with UniversalPaymentCheckout component
tasks.testStrategy: Test the Zelle manual flow including instructions display, confirmation, and pending status updates.

tasks.title: Implement Instant Checkout (ACP) support
tasks.description: Add support for Stripe Instant Checkout when flagged as available by the backend.
tasks.details:
- Detect when backend returns `{ providerType: "STRIPE", sessionUrl }`
- Add "Instant Checkout (Beta)" button
- Implement modal with hosted checkout
- Handle success redirect
- Ensure proper loading and error states
tasks.testStrategy: Test the complete ACP flow from button click to hosted checkout to successful return.

tasks.title: Update Event Page to display payment method badges
tasks.description: Update the Upcoming Events section to show badges for supported payment methods based on event metadata.
tasks.details:
- Create payment method badge components
- Fetch and display supported payment methods from backend event metadata
- Ensure badges follow design guidelines
- Maintain existing hero image logic
tasks.testStrategy: Verify badges display correctly for events with different payment method configurations.

tasks.title: Create Admin Tenant Settings UI for payment options
tasks.description: Add toggles in the admin tenant settings for various payment options.
tasks.details:
- Add toggle for "Instant Checkout beta"
- Add toggle for "Enable Zeffy for fundraisers"
- Add toggle for "Enable Zelle manual payments"
- Add toggle for "Enable Revolut checkout"
- Connect form to new proxy endpoints
- Follow UI style guide for layout
tasks.testStrategy: Test that toggles correctly update backend settings and persist between sessions.

tasks.title: Implement Membership Portal subscription UI
tasks.description: Add support for subscription plan selection and management in the Membership Portal.
tasks.details:
- Create subscription plan selection UI (monthly/yearly)
- Implement integration with `/api/proxy/memberships/subscriptions` endpoints
- Display current subscription status and renewal date
- Add cancellation request functionality
- Ensure proper loading and error states
tasks.testStrategy: Test the complete subscription lifecycle including selection, payment, status viewing, and cancellation.

tasks.title: Implement currency and date localization
tasks.description: Add support for localized currency and date formats based on tenant settings.
tasks.details:
- Create utility functions for currency formatting (GBP/EUR support for UK/EU tenants)
- Implement date formatting based on locale
- Update all price and date displays to use these utilities
- Ensure proper number formatting for different currencies
tasks.testStrategy: Test with different tenant locales to ensure correct formatting of currencies and dates.

tasks.title: Implement accessibility enhancements
tasks.description: Ensure all payment components meet accessibility requirements.
tasks.details:
- Verify all buttons meet contrast requirements
- Add clear loading and success messaging for hosted flows
- Ensure keyboard navigation works across all payment components
- Implement screen-reader announcements when switching providers
- Test with screen readers and keyboard navigation
tasks.testStrategy: Test with accessibility tools to ensure WCAG compliance and proper keyboard/screen reader support.

tasks.title: Create mock responses for development
tasks.description: Implement mock responses based on Swagger schema to enable frontend development before backend completion.
tasks.details:
- Create mock response data for all payment endpoints
- Implement mock server or MSW setup for local development
- Ensure mock data covers all provider types and edge cases
- Add toggle to switch between mock and real backend
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that mock responses match the expected schema and enable proper frontend testing.

tasks.title: Implement error handling and logging
tasks.description: Add comprehensive error handling and logging for all payment-related operations.
tasks.details:
- Implement error boundaries around payment components
- Add detailed error logging for API failures
- Create user-friendly error messages for different failure scenarios
- Implement retry mechanisms where appropriate
- Ensure errors are properly reported to monitoring systems
tasks.testStrategy: Test with various error scenarios to ensure proper handling, messaging, and logging.

tasks.title: Integrate and test complete checkout flow
tasks.description: Integrate all payment components into the checkout flow and test end-to-end.
tasks.details:
- Ensure seamless integration of UniversalPaymentCheckout into existing checkout flow
- Test complete purchase flow with all payment providers
- Verify success, cancel, and error paths for each provider
- Test with various product and tenant configurations
tasks.testStrategy: Perform end-to-end testing of the complete checkout flow with each payment provider.

tasks.title: Create documentation for payment integration
tasks.description: Document the payment integration for developers and testers.
tasks.details:
- Document the UniversalPaymentCheckout component API
- Create usage examples for each payment provider
- Document admin configuration options
- Add troubleshooting guides for common issues
- Include testing instructions for QA team
tasks.testStrategy: Review documentation for completeness and accuracy with team members.
